recommendations.title: Notre-Dame on Fire
recommendations.overview: A film relating from the inside the Notre-Dame de Paris fire of April 2019.

recommendations.title: Enemy at the Gates
recommendations.overview: A Russian and a German sniper play a game of cat-and-mouse during the Battle of Stalingrad in WWII.

recommendations.title: Two Brothers
recommendations.overview: Two tigers are separated as cubs and taken into captivity, only to be reunited years later as enemies by an explorer (Pearce) who inadvertently forces them to fight each other.

recommendations.title: The Bear
recommendations.overview: An orphan bear cub hooks up with an adult male as they try to dodge human hunters.

recommendations.title: Seven Years in Tibet
recommendations.overview: Austrian mountaineer Heinrich Harrer journeys to the Himalayas without his family to head an expedition in 1939. But when World War II breaks out, the arrogant Harrer falls into Allied forces' hands as a prisoner of war. He escapes with a fellow deta

recommendations.title: The Name of the Rose
recommendations.overview: 14th-century Franciscan monk William of Baskerville and his young novice arrive at a conference to find that several monks have been murdered under mysterious circumstances. To solve the crimes, William must rise up against the Church's authority and

recommendations.title: The Lover
recommendations.overview: A poor French teenage girl engages in an illicit affair with a wealthy Chinese heir in 1920s Saigon. For the first time in her young life she has control, and she wields it deftly over her besotted lover throughout a series of clandestine meetings an

recommendations.title: Hothead
recommendations.overview: François, a miserable football player, becomes a town hero after bringing victory in an extremely important game. He uses his fame for revenge on the team star for the previous mockeries.

recommendations.title: Quest for Fire
recommendations.overview: In the prehistoric world, a Cro-Magnon tribe depends on an ever-burning source of fire, which eventually extinguishes. Lacking the knowledge to start a new fire, the tribe sends three warriors on a quest for more. With the tribe's future at stake, th

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.
